source.title: PDD Holdings Q4 2025 and FY2025 Unaudited Financial Results - Cost Structure

extractions.claim: FY2025 cost of revenue surged 23% YoY to RMB 188.8B, driven by fulfillment, bandwidth/server, and payment processing fees
extractions.evidence: FY2025 CoR: RMB 188,801.8M (+23% from RMB 153,900.4M in FY2024). Gross margin compressed to 56.3% from 60.9% in FY2024. The increase was primarily driven by increased fulfillment fees, bandwidth and server costs, and payment processing fees.

verification.verifier_notes: Direct from press release. Gross margin calculated: (431,845.7 - 188,801.8) / 431,845.7 = 56.3%

extractions.claim: FY2025 operating expenses grew 13% but R&D surged 30%, signaling strategic technology investment
extractions.evidence: FY2025 opex breakdown: S&M RMB 125,287.9M (+13%), G&A RMB 6,635.8M (-12%), R&D RMB 16,496.2M (+30%). Total opex RMB 148,419.9M (+13%). R&D increase due to staff-related costs and bandwidth/server costs.

extractions.claim: Q4 2025 operating profit grew +8.3% YoY despite FY2025 declining -13%, suggesting margin compression may be bottoming
extractions.evidence: Q4 2025 operating profit: RMB 27,719.7M vs Q4 2024 RMB 25,592.2M (+8.3%). Q4 operating margin: 22.4% vs Q4 2024 23.1%. FY2025 operating profit RMB 94,624.1M vs FY2024 RMB 108,422.9M (-13%). FY2025 operating margin: 21.9% vs FY2024 27.5%.

verification.verifier_notes: Operating margins calculated from revenue and operating profit figures in press release

extractions.claim: S&M expense as % of revenue remained stable at ~29% in FY2025, indicating disciplined marketing spend despite investment cycle
extractions.evidence: FY2025 S&M/Revenue: 125,287.9/431,845.7 = 29.0%. FY2024 S&M/Revenue: 111,300.5/393,836.1 = 28.3%. Q4 2025 S&M/Revenue: 34,352.3/123,912.2 = 27.7%. Slight increase but not dramatic escalation.
